[12 servings now]
[8 more servings later]
[Steak Tartare and Live Webfoot Octopus]
[Cut up that beef]
[Also the webfoot octopus]
[Sugar and Sesame Oil]
[Octopus in]
[Mix it up]
[Ready to serve]
[12 Servings of Steak Tartare Live Octopus]
[So Tasty]
[Also some fried rice]
[8 servings of fried rice]
[I'm in tears]
[Delicious]
[She's eating so much]

[Amazing]
[OMG]
[Cleaned the dishes today]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Hadang-dong, city of Mokpo
Steak tartare live octopus and...
What was it again? It was something strange Live chicken gizzard?
Chicken feet? They're known for those
I wanted to try them all and was wondering which one to pick
I've decided to get some steak tartare live octopus and sashimi
I can eat steak tartare, but I'm not too good with live octopus
I tried it last time and it was pretty good
It's good, but I'm scared
Over here
[Myungjin Maht Jip located in Jeollanam-do, Mokpo]
Hello~!

[The menu]
Excuse me,
Live webfoot octopus...
4 orders of those
4 of them?
4 plates, please
Do you have sashimi right now?
We only have gizzard shad right now
I'll take that as well
[Sidedishes]
[Grilled croaker too]
They give you grilled croaker as a side dish
I used to love eating these Like really
Take the bones out from the side
It's salted perfectly It's so tender
It melts in my mouth

[What are you and why are you so delicious?]
Right, this is the real deal
Its meat is so soft
You would need to get 1 plate
Just 1?
-It's a lot of food -It's fine!
I can eat it all
[How's that even possible]
4 plates...
[Really?]
[My head hurts]
[Cut up that raw beef]
[Chop up the webfoot octopus]
[Ready to get mixed in]
[With steak tartare]
[Sesame oil]

[Sugar]
[Mix it all up]
[Put the octopus in]
[Mix it again]
[Steak tartare with live webfoot octopus]
Wow, thank you
Looks good
Oh my It's moving
Thank you
Are you eating this much?
[That deserves an applause]
It's moving so much
They're going at it
Let's get a bite of the tartare
It's tasty
Let's try it together now

I'm not too good at eating live octopus, but I'll give it a try
It tastes good, but they look gross I'm scared of that tentacle feeling
With some sesame oil & salt
It's good
I've tried both of them individually
But I think they go best together
This is why they serve them together
It's supposed to be wrapped with dried seaweed
Take some on there
Come here!
I'm going to eat you I can do it now
I couldn't before, but now I can
On the seaweed
[Taste expressed with motions]
There's a good thing about this
You'd have to chew a lot because of the live octopus

So you get to taste the tartare for even longer
These big ones scare me
I'd have to eat them later When they're almost dead
It tastes good wrapped inside the dried seaweed
Come here I'll eat you
You're too strong I don't want it
Be careful when you're eating these
I almost choked on it when I was younger That's why I'm not too good at eating these
You'd need to chew them up completely before you swallow
Don't swallow it right away!
Steak tartare is really delicious
[Webfoot Octopus Warning]
It got stuck on here
That feels weird
They use Korean female cows for the tartare And Mokpo Webfoot Octopus for these
What are you?

[Hi]
I can't look at it
I'm terrified of things that crawl
[Thank you for helping me!]
I ordered gizzard shad sashimi,
but it's pretty late right now
So I'll just have these
From my observation,
It's evident that a lot of locals come to this restaurant
That's how you know it's good
Can I wrap it with anything else other than dried seaweed?
Perilla leaf
Oh thank you!
[Teaching her how to eat it]
Thank you
Put the octopus and tartare on the leaf

Then put a piece of garlic with some soybean paste
-Is that alright? -Yes, yummy!
[Satisfied]
[Scrape it up]
Sesame oil gives it a very nutty flavor
But soybean paste gives it a very savory taste
It's good
Garlic and soybean paste
[That's just so tasty!]
Excuse me,
Is it possible to get fried rice?
Yes, we can do it
Then I'll take this as fried rice Thank you!
They usually make fried rice with small portions
But I'm getting it with a whole plate because I don't have much time
[Can't forget about kimchi when you're making fried rice!]

[Bean sprouts]
[White rice]
[Mix mix!]
[Chili oil]
[Onions]
[And the meat]
[With gochujang (red chili pepper paste)]
[Fried Rice complete]
That looks yummy
Thank you!
This is irresistible
That looks scrumptious
Webfoot octopus and beef fried rice
[What?]
[Excuse me ma'am?]
[Yes?]

[This right here...]
[How is it?]
It's so good!
It tastes so good!
It's good
How many minutes did she take to make this?
How long?
It's so flavorful
Drink some soju with live octopus
Eat some soup
And finish it up with this fried rice
You'd be left with a "wow"
On dried seaweed
Wait, I might want another plate of this
I want more
This is the best

A spoonful
It's good
Put some of that on here
Are you forreal?
So many different ways to eat this I love it
Some soybean paste
With garlic
[Nom nom]
[Endless interjections]
The octopus meat became more tender over time
It's really soft
It'd taste great aged too
They taste better over time
It's good as it is, but
Fried rice is just way too good
[Contemplating] Should I get more?

Let's take some out
[And get the rest as fried rice]
They gave me some aged kimchi
The color looks amazing
[Bring that over here]
Their kimchi is great
[Waiting on her next plate as she eats]
On top
It's so good
[Vacuum mode]
It's really soft
Its consistency is just around the middle even if it's cooked
Thank you, ma'am
My mouth is watering
Hot hot hot
Some on top

[Very hot]
Kimchi on top
[On the perilla leaf]
[More?]
Can I eat this in 1 bite?
[No problem]
[Dried seaweed now]
[Only this much left?]
[Let's finish it up]
Let's mix it
[She might be a genius!]
[Scrape the last of it]
1 last bite!
[Cleaned the dishes today]
[Wow, unbelievable]
I didn't think you'd eat it all when you first ordered

How would you even eat all of that?
I only ate this much because I only had 1 hour
[Oh My God]
1 plate of that fried rice is about 3-4 servings
Meat was 12 servings total
8 servings of fried rice
I'm totally freaked out
I was able to eat it all because your cooking was amazing
I was told that this place is a hot place for the locals
I loved the taste of the food
And the atmosphere was nice with all of the regulars here
I liked how crowded/loud it was
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
